name: Animate Dead

components.material: a drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust

description: You animate a bone pile or corpse within range as an undead servant (a Skeleton or Zombie) under your control, obeying your commands for 24 hours; recast within that window to extend control and raise/maintain more. Engine: a controllable undead summon is descriptive only until the player-summon roster includes raised undead.
